name: Pork Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak mushrooms in hot water for 20 minutes or until soft. Drain.
2. Rinse in warm water. Drain again.
3. Squeeze out excess moisture and discard stems. Chop caps finely.
4. Mix together mushrooms, pork, bamboo shoots, green onions, egg white, cornstarch, salt, 2 teaspoons soy sauce, 1/2 teaspoon sesame oil, and white pepper.
5. Hold a siu mai skin in hand (cover remaining skins with plastic wrap to keep them pliable).
6. Place about one tablespoon of pork mixture in the center of the skin.
7. Bring the edge of the skin up side of the filling, leaving the top open. Repeat with remaining skins.
8. Cover filled dumplings with plastic wrap to prevent drying out.
9. Place dumplings in a single layer on a rack in a steamer. Cover and steam over boiling water for 20 minutes (add more boiling water if necessary).
10. Mix together 1/4 cup soy sauce and 1/8 teaspoon sesame oil. Serve with dumplings.
